name: Logo Systems Designer
description: Adapting marks for every size and background.

details.overview: Design not just one logo, but a complete family of marks — full version, simplified icon, monogram, symbol — that work perfectly at every size, from tiny icon to huge signage. Define clear rules for spacing, minimum size and correct use. Ensure recognition remains strong no matter where or how it appears. A good system protects and strengthens the mark.
